title: AI Filmmaking Tutorial: Character Consistency Fixed!
summary: ImagineArt Film Studio is an end-to-end AI video production platform with storyboard mode, character consistency features, multi-shot generation with camera presets, extend functionality for longer scenes, and built-in timeline editing. The creator demonstrated building a 60-second AI film with consistent character appearance across four different environments entirely within the browser.
